solutions.solution: According to the unfolded dice, So, 1 is opposite to 6, 2 is opposite to 4 and 3 is opposite to 5. Hence, only option (d) is the correct answer because in this number 5 is opposite to each other.
According to the question, So ○ is opposite to □, ● is opposite to ■ and ○ is opposite to ○. Hence, only the cube figure (a) is the correct answer.
According to the unfolded dice, So ○ is opposite to ■, + is opposite to ● and ○ is opposite to ×. Clearly, option (b) is the correct answer.
According to the question So ○ is opposite to ●, ■ is opposite to □ and ◊ is opposite to ×. Now, it is clear that, when unfolded dice will be folded then option (c) having the cube would be correct.
According to the unfolded dice, So, two blank faces are opposite to each other ■ is opposite to ○ and □ is opposite to ○. Hence, only option (d) is correct.
According to the question, So ○ is opposite to ■, × is opposite to □. And two blank faces are opposite to each other. Now, it is clear that only option (a) is correct.
According to the unfolded dice. So, two blank faces of cube are opposite to two another blank faces. And ○ is opposite to ■. Hence, only the cube figure (a) is the correct answer.
According to the question, So ■ is opposite to >, + is opposite to ↓, and × is opposite to ○. Clearly, option (b) is having exact cube when unfolded dice will be folded.
According to the question, So ● is opposite to △, ○ is opposite to ●, and ■ is opposite to ◊. Hence, option (a) is the correct answer.
According to the question, So ○ is opposite to ×, △ is opposite to /, and □ is opposite to ○. Hence, only the cube figure (d) is the correct answer.
According to the unfolded dice, So × is opposite to ■, and □ is opposite to ○. And two blank faces are opposite to each other. Now, it is clear that only option (c) is correct.
According to the unfolded dice, So □ is opposite to ○, ■ is opposite to ○, and × is opposite to ◊. Hence, option (c) is the correct answer.
